## Summary
<!-- 1-3 bullet points describing what this PR does -->

## Phase & Task Reference
- Phase: <!-- e.g., Phase 1: Foundation -->
- Task: <!-- e.g., 1.3 Ingest GeoHub Parcels -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] test: Adding/updating tests
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes
- [ ] chore: Maintenance

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] Code follows CLAUDE.md conventions
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Linting passes (`uv run ruff check` / `eslint`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`uv run ty check` / `tsc`)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
- [ ] SQL uses parameterized queries only
- [ ] All geometry is EPSG:4326
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits format

## Review Response Policy
> Every review comment must be replied to with a one-line description of what was done to address it, or why it was dismissed. No unresolved threads at merge time.

## Test Evidence
<!-- Screenshots, curl commands, query results, test output -->

## Breaking Changes
<!-- List any breaking changes, or "None" -->
